objectives: Discover and map all target domains
Identify potential entry points for testing
tools: Network traffic analysis tools (e.g. Wireshark, Tcpdump)
Social media and online presence analysis tools (e.g. Whois, Social Blade)
success_criteria: All target domains have been discovered and mapped
All domains have at least one identified entry point for testing
Comprehensive asset map has been created

objectives: Prioritize vulnerabilities based on potential impact
success_criteria: All discovered vulnerabilities have been categorized into classes
Vulnerabilities have been prioritized based on potential impact
Classes have been identified and prioritized correctly

objectives: Validate results and ensure correct exploitation of vulnerabilities
success_criteria: All hypotheses have been tested with payloads
Results have been validated and correct exploitation of vulnerabilities confirmed
Exploitation results and findings have been documented correctly

objectives: Identify and resolve duplicates and private known issues
success_criteria: All findings have been validated and prioritized correctly
Duplicates and private known issues have been identified and resolved
Correct exploitation of vulnerabilities has been confirmed

objectives: Ensure compliance with program rules and metrics
Prepare and submit findings to Threshold Network team
success_criteria: All findings have been documented correctly
Program rules and metrics have been ensured compliance
Submissions have been prepared and submitted to Threshold Network team

risk_considerations: Threats to user funds and security
Compliance with program rules and metrics
